description: Single-category area chart of the number of North Carolina students graduating within four years each year from 2016 to 2025, drawn as a heavy teal line over a light teal fill on a zero baseline. The count climbs overall from about 97,700 to a record 111,474 in 2025, with a dip in 2021–2022. The filled area gives visual weight to the total quantity rather than the year-to-year change.

title.text: NC graduated a record 111,000 students in 2025
subtitle: Students graduating within four years, count, 2016–2025. Area charts suit total-quantity-over-time:
the shaded weight reinforces the total, and a zero baseline (like a bar) keeps it honest. Teal = rising over the span.

usermeta.source: Source: NCDPI public accountability data (4-year cohort graduates), 2016–2025. Style-guide demo.
